q: Did you often go outside to have a walk when you were a child?
examiner_note: Nói về kỷ niệm tuổi thơ. Sử dụng 'cherished memories', 'bond', 'explore the neighborhood'.

band7.text: Yes, I remember going for walks in the park with my grandparents almost every weekend. It was a cherished time for us to bond and for me to explore the nature around us. I really miss those carefree days.
band7.note: Sử dụng từ vựng tốt (cherished, bond, carefree).

band8.text: Absolutely. My parents were big proponents of outdoor activity, so we’d regularly go for evening strolls around the neighborhood. It was a fantastic way to unwind after school and sparked my curiosity about the local flora and fauna.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng tự nhiên (proponents, strolls, unwind, sparked curiosity, flora and fauna).

band9.text: Looking back, my childhood was characterized by a deep connection with the outdoors. I spent countless hours wandering through nearby fields and woodlands, which fostered a sense of wonder and discovery. Those early experiences were fundamental in shaping my appreciation for the natural world and the simple pleasure of walking.
band9.note: Sử dụng cấu trúc câu phức và từ vựng phong phú (characterized by, wandering, fostered, fundamental, shaping appreciation).

v.example: I have cherished memories of my childhood.
Walking is a great way to unwind.
The environment fostered a sense of community.

advanced_vocab.example: He is a strong proponent of healthy living.

similar_questions: What games did you play outside when you were a child?
Who did you walk with when you were young?
